get to know strings a little closer We have read about strings that strings are a very interesting data type but we will understand what exactly a string is So what happens is that if you close anything in Python in double quote it becomes a string For example, if I write here name is equal to Harry in double quote So this becomes a string Then I write here friend is equal to Rohan So this becomes another string If I write here another friend is equal to Lovish So this becomes another string Now I can make Lovish in single quote like this So here double quote and here single quote and we can make a string with the help of double quote and single quote I have written here In Python anything that you enclose between single and double quotation marks is considered as a string A string is essentially a sequence of array of textual data Strings are used when working with Unicode characters So this is a very important thing Here I have given an example which you can copy and paste and
